canonical_origin_example: B from canonical QBL origin can follow Fibonacci/Farey corridor
general_b_rule: B refinement is a state-carried operational refinement and can begin from arbitrary 1/n depth or asymmetric (u,v) pairs
external_bridge_standard: retained current state controls legal successor
refinement can begin from non-origin state
completion or overflow blocks same-domain continuation
Q/B context determines whether another refinement is admitted
blocked continuation contributes to lift/re-chart/new-domain opening
ancient_yi_status: strong operational B-candidate; arithmetic law differs from canonical origin B but bridge remains relevant
do_not_require: exact q=(u,v)->sort(v,u+v) from origin in external source
